harness.context_description:
This is taking place in 1982 Menlo Park among the boom in computers at a
RadioShack in a mall. The Radioshack has cheap consumer products and the mall
is 1970s style. The people walking around it are normal middle class people.

timing_breakdown.action: The Narrator hefts the Compaq Portable
The Narrator drags the Compaq toward the AMC Eagle
The Narrator loads the Compaq into the back
Orion sets a box of materials beside the Compaq

full_prompt:
Context: This is taking place in 1982 Menlo Park among the boom in computers at a
RadioShack in a mall. The Radioshack has cheap consumer products and the mall
is 1970s style. The people walking around it are normal middle class people.. Film stock: 35mm film grain. Color palette: cinematic. Lighting: cinematic. Era: modern. Mood: neutral. wide shot. 0:00-0:05: The Narrator hefts the Compaq Portable. 0:05-0:11: The Narrator drags the Compaq toward the AMC Eagle. 0:11-0:16: The Narrator loads the Compaq into the back. 0:16-0:20: Orion sets a box of materials beside the Compaq.
composite_prompt: Background: The office: the narrator's workplace containing their usual test subjects and where they return at the end of the day., Orion - a 30 year old man with a long beard. He is contemplative and a professional, Compaq Portable - 1983 portable computer, beige luggable design with built-in 9-inch amber or green monochrome monitor, full keyboard that attaches to front, approximately 30 pounds with carrying handle, AMC Eagle - early 1980s four-wheel-drive station wagon, boxy design with wood paneling or rust-colored body, elevated ride height
